languages.original_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

languages.text: "Да-а, казалось бы, латают тут живых, да только атмосферка — для шестеренок одних! Надеюсь, они выпускают вылеченных быстрее, чем они сваливаются от новых болезней, надышавшись этой дрянью".

"Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."
languages.original_text: "Да-а, казалось бы, латают тут живых, да только атмосферка — для шестеренок одних! Надеюсь, они выпускают вылеченных быстрее, чем они сваливаются от новых болезней, надышавшись этой дрянью".

traits.locale_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

"Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

"Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

languages.text: 「まさに、ここでの生活は補修されているように見えるが、雰囲気は歯車だけのために作られている！このものを吸い込むことで新しい病気を患うよりも早く回復していることを願う」
languages.original_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

traits.locale_text: 「まさに、ここでの生活は補修されているように見えるが、雰囲気は歯車だけのために作られている！このものを吸い込むことで新しい病気を患うよりも早く回復していることを願う。」

languages.text: « Tout à fait. Ils prétendent soigner les vivants ici, mais cet environnement n'est adapté qu'aux tas de boulons ! J'espère qu'ils laissent partir les patients guéris avant qu'ils retombent malades à force de respirer cet air vicié. »
languages.original_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

traits.locale_text: « Tout à fait. Ils prétendent soigner les vivants ici, mais cet environnement n'est adapté qu'aux tas de boulons ! J'espère qu'ils laissent partir les patients guéris avant qu'ils retombent malades à force de respirer cet air vicié. »

languages.text: "Exakt, sie scheinen die Lebenden hier zu verarzten ... in einer Atmosphäre für Cogs. Ich hoffe, sie entlassen die Geheilten schneller, als sie sich neue Krankheiten einfangen, indem sie diese Luft einatmen."
languages.original_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

traits.locale_text: "Exakt, sie scheinen die Lebenden hier zu verarzten ... in einer Atmosphäre für Cogs. Ich hoffe, sie entlassen die Geheilten schneller, als sie sich neue Krankheiten einfangen, indem sie diese Luft einatmen."

languages.text: "Kesinlikle. Burada yaşayanları yamalıyorlar gibi görünüyor ama atmosfer sadece dişlilere göre! Umarım iyileşenleri, bu şeyi soluyarak yeni hastalıklara yakalanmalarından daha hızlı taburcu ediyorlardır."
languages.original_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

traits.locale_text: "Kesinlikle. Burada yaşayanları yamalıyorlar gibi görünüyor ama atmosfer sadece dişlilere göre! Umarım iyileşenleri, bu şeyi soluyarak yeni hastalıklara yakalanmalarından daha hızlı taburcu ediyorlardır."

languages.text: «¡Exactamente; aquí se remienda a los vivos, pero el aire parece pensado para las máquinas! Más vale que los enfermos se curen rápido antes de contraer enfermedades nuevas por respirar este aire».
languages.original_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

traits.locale_text: «¡Exactamente; aquí se remienda a los vivos, pero el aire parece pensado para las máquinas! Más vale que los enfermos se curen rápido antes de contraer enfermedades nuevas por respirar este aire».

languages.text: “可不是嘛，他们在这儿修补活人，可这里的空气分明只适合齿轮佬！但愿他们释放痊愈者的速度，能赶上病人因为吸这玩意儿染上新病的速度。”
languages.original_text: "Exactly, they seem to be patching up the living here, but the atmosphere is for cogs alone! I hope they're releasing the cured faster than they're coming down with new diseases from breathing in this stuff."

traits.locale_text: “可不是嘛，他们在这儿修补活人，可这里的空气分明只适合齿轮佬！但愿他们释放痊愈者的速度，能赶上病人因为吸这玩意儿染上新病的速度。”
